description_long: This is a rectangular juice carton with a predominantly yellow and white color scheme, branded as 'EASY MOUZUO'. The front of the package features a large, realistic illustration of a guava fruit, both whole and sliced, indicating the guava flavor. The packaging displays bilingual text, with 'boisson de goyave' and 'guava drink' written in French and English, respectively, along with the word 'GUAVA' in bold yellow letters. The sides of the carton include a detailed nutritional information panel and ingredients list, as well as a barcode and various certification logos. The top of the carton is sealed and does not show any visible cap or straw opening, suggesting a simple, sealed closure typical of small juice cartons. The overall design is clean and modern, with clear branding and product information visible from multiple angles.
description: A yellow and white rectangular guava juice carton labeled 'EASY MOUZUO', featuring a guava fruit illustration and bilingual product information. The packaging is compact, with nutritional details and branding clearly displayed.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'EASY MOUZUO' brand, guava fruit illustration, and French product description.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the nutritional information panel and part of the top seal.
description_view_2: Alternate front view with English product description, guava illustration, and branding.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing ingredients, barcode, and additional product details in multiple languages.
